pr.title: Improve matching across multiple source files
pr.author: fjooord

summary: Large multi-subsystem matching PR touching 95 files, with reported 34 matched functions, 2 matched sections, 117 unmatched-item improvements, and no final broken/fuzzy/metric regressions. Review cleanup focused on converting a generated-looking fighter dispatch to a grouped switch, removing register/optimizer pragma steering, restoring inline literals instead of generated symbol names, and removing a new M2C_FIELD use.

key_files.role: SDK THP matching work; diff shows temporary typed offset views for THPFileInfo fields, MCU buffers, restart fields, and predDC accesses.
camera matching cleanup; diff shows stack/local declaration shape changes, boolean-condition folding with abs_threshold_inline, and explicit cam->transform field accesses.
fighter dispatch cleanup; reviewer suggested switch shape and author later reported converting reviewed goto dispatch into grouped switch.
review cleanup target; reviewer objected to newly added register keyword and author reported removing it.
review cleanup target; reviewer asked to remove register and author reported doing so.
literal cleanup target; reviewer said strings/floats should generally remain inline instead of generated data symbols.
literal and pragma cleanup target; reviewer objected to symbolizing a string literal and to added optimizer pragma.
readability and literal cleanup target; reviewer asked to revert less-readable literal-symbol changes, saying linking would resolve them.
literal cleanup target and reported unmatched .bss improvement.
typed-field cleanup target; author reported removing a new M2C_FIELD use after review cleanup.
particle context-slot type fix with narrow object build and regression-check evidence reported by author.
reported largest new data match for main/sysdolphin/baselib/axdriver .data.
largest changed file by line count in metadata; two lbaudio_ax functions reported as largest new matches.

metadata reports 95 changed files total; loaded changed-files excerpts include fighter, game-mode, stage, item, library, menu, player, video, and sysdolphin files, but the displayed JSONL is truncated.

what_changed: Changed 95 files with 1408 additions and 1441 deletions according to PR metadata.
Reported final comparison against origin/master baseline 5d2393e4bf9e085e7e911af3a0f17081e7cf1b56 at head a81d8f8f5c863031fd24e05bda3c4bdbe47c14fd.
Reported 36 new matches, including 34 functions and 2 sections, with 0 broken matches and 117 unmatched-item improvements.
Reported fuzzy match improved from 97.428474 to 97.461624, matched code from 70.79643 to 71.48751, matched data from 41.350536 to 41.43838, and matched functions from 18714 to 18748.

Diff excerpt shows THPDec changes replacing some global-buffer/component accesses with temporary struct views and pointer casts to express offsets such as MCUsPerRow, mcuBuffer, restart fields, dLC decode fields, and component predDC fields.

Diff excerpt shows camera.c changes involving stack padding, local declaration ordering, condition folding around Camera_80030AF8/Ground_801C57A4/abs_threshold_inline, and explicit cam->transform/cam->transform_copy field accesses.

Review cleanup was explicitly reported: ftCo_09F7 goto dispatch converted to grouped switch, register uses removed from ftCo_Bury.c and gm_19EF.c, literals restored inline in ftcoll.c/gm_1832.c/gm_1A4C.c/gmregclear.c/ifprize.c, optimizer pragma removed in gm_1832.c, and new M2C_FIELD removed in grinishie1.c.
Author reported verification via ninja, ninja changes_all, GitHub CI jobs, and resolved review threads; earlier bot report for d65ac60 was marked stale and superseded by the current a81d8f8 report.
smart_moves: Separated orchestrator artifacts from the Melee PR scope; PR body says decomp-orchestrator/ and local artifacts were kept out of the PR.
After review, author preserved match progress while applying readability cleanup rather than keeping generated-looking constructs.
Used a narrow particle.o build after a particle context-slot type fix before broad ninja and regression checks.
Documented stale bot report status and supplied a newer report, reducing ambiguity around final regression status.
Resolved all current and outdated review threads according to the PR body.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Generated-looking goto dispatch should be checked against grouped switch forms when the branch structure suggests it.
Do not introduce register, asm, or similar codegen-steering keywords as ordinary matching tactics; reviewers requested removal in this PR.
Keep ordinary float and string constants inline for code matching unless there is data-ownership evidence and PR scope for symbolizing them.
Added optimizer pragmas are high-risk matching tactics and should be removed unless tightly justified; this PR had an added global_optimizer pragma removed after review.
New M2C_FIELD usage should be treated as bridge code and removed when a cleaner typed expression is available or review rejects it.

For broad multi-file matching PRs, include a regression ledger with baseline/head SHAs, new matches, broken matches, improvements, and metric regressions so review can separate final evidence from stale bot reports.

naming_conventions.convention: The PR restored inline literals instead of address-style/generated global names for ordinary strings and floats, e.g. replacing proposed symbols such as ftColl_804D82F0 or lbl_803D9438 back to literals per review.
A local parameter/role rename from arg1 to gfx_id appears in the ftCo_09F7 diff hunk where efAsync_Spawn passes gfx_id; this is evidence of a local semantic name, not a global naming rule.
Temporary struct view names in THPDec use descriptive suffixes such as THPMCURowFields, THPFileInfoMCUBufferView, and THPFileInfoDCTCompYView to document recovered offset windows.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use grouped switch for dispatch-like fighter code instead of leaving goto/label blocks when it preserves matching behavior.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Requires objdiff/regression confirmation because switch lowering can alter branch tables or compare ordering.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust local declaration order, lifetimes, and stack padding narrowly for camera matching.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Evidence shows PAD_STACK and declaration changes but does not by itself prove final objdiff for each function; rely on PR verification rather than treating this as general style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use temporary typed overlay structs for partially recovered THPFileInfo offsets instead of leaving every access as unrelated globals or raw decompiler temporaries.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Temporary overlay structs with padding are bridge code; curator should not promote specific THP field offsets as accepted path facts from this PR alone.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Prefer inline literals over introducing address-named string/float symbols to influence data relocation in focused code-matching work.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: If a later PR is explicitly data-ownership scoped, symbolization might be justified with section metadata; this PR's review rejected it for these cases.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Avoid register keywords and optimizer pragmas unless exceptional evidence exists; this PR removed both after review.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: These tactics can mask source understanding and perturb neighbors.

review_feedback.feedback: Code structure felt like one or more big switch statements; reviewer asked author to try matching a switch.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author reported converting reviewed ftCo_09F7 goto dispatch into a grouped switch while preserving matching behavior.

review_feedback.feedback: Do not use register, asm, or similar keywords.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author reported removing register usage in ftCo_Bury.c.

review_feedback.feedback: Keep constants like strings and floats inline; such issues will be resolved during linking.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author reported restoring inline float/string literals in ftcoll.c.

review_feedback.feedback: Same inline-literal concern for replacing string literal ScItrAllstar_scene_data with lbl_803D9438.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author reported restoring inline literals in gm_1832.c.
Author reported removing the added optimizer pragma in gm_1832.c.
Author reported removing register usage in gm_19EF.c.

review_feedback.feedback: Revert less-readable changes involving extracted THP filename string symbols; reviewer said they would be resolved during linking.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author reported restoring inline float/string literals in gm_1A4C.c.

review_feedback.feedback: A new M2C_FIELD use was removed as part of review cleanup.
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author reported removing the new M2C_FIELD usage in grinishie1.c.

notes: Strong evidence for PR identity, merge status, author, headline verification, review comments, and explicitly reported review cleanup.

Changed-files evidence reports 95 files, but the loaded changed_files.jsonl and raw diff are truncated, so this postmortem lists representative/high-signal files rather than an exhaustive verified 95-path inventory.
Diff evidence is excerpted and truncated; file-specific tactics are recorded only where visible in the supplied excerpt or explicitly mentioned in comments.
Verification results are author/PR-body reported and CI status reported in the PR text; no tools were run during intake.

The stale bot report in text_corpus showed one unmatched regression, but PR body explicitly marks older d65ac60 report stale and superseded by a current a81d8f8 report with 0 regressions; final summary uses the later PR-body evidence.
No reviewer intent beyond the quoted comments is inferred.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Try grouped switch before preserving goto dispatch
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2583, reviewer jurrejelle identified ftCo_09F7 dispatch code as likely switch-shaped and asked the author to try a switch; the author later reported converting the reviewed goto dispatch into a grouped switch while preserving matching behavior.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Avoid register and optimizer pragma steering in normal decomp source
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2583 review rejected added register keywords in ftCo_Bury.c and gm_19EF.c and an added global_optimizer pragma in gm_1832.c; the author reported removing them.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep ordinary literals inline in code-matching PRs
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2583 review rejected replacing inline float/string literals with generated data symbols in files including ftcoll.c, gm_1832.c, and gm_1A4C.c; the author reported restoring inline literals in ftcoll.c, gm_1832.c, gm_1A4C.c, gmregclear.c, and ifprize.c.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR #2583 as example evidence for no register/pragma steering
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2583 contains review evidence where register keywords in ftCo_Bury.c and gm_19EF.c and an added global_optimizer pragma in gm_1832.c were requested for removal and later reported removed.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already cover this; curator may attach PR #2583 as concrete historical support, not as a new rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR #2583 as example evidence for inline literals over generated symbols
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2583 review objected to replacing ordinary inline float/string literals with generated symbol names, and author reported restoring inline literals across ftcoll.c, gm_1832.c, gm_1A4C.c, gmregclear.c, and ifprize.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful historical example for an existing standard; not a new accepted source-corpus fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR #2583 as example for switch-shaped dispatch cleanup
source_update_candidates.text: Reviewer suggested a switch for ftCo_09F7's generated-looking branch/goto dispatch, and the author reported converting the reviewed dispatch into a grouped switch while preserving matching behavior.
source_update_candidates.reason: Supports existing guidance to check generated branch ladders/gotos against ordinary C forms.

source_update_candidates.title: Possible THPDec temporary overlay-struct pattern
source_update_candidates.text: The THPDec diff excerpt introduced temporary view structs such as THPMCURowFields, THPFileInfoMCUBufferView, and THPFileInfoDCTCompY/U/VView for offset-based accesses inside extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-local decomp tactic, but exact field ownership and offset facts should not be promoted without current source/header verification.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the specific 95-file inventory from this intake as exhaustive; loaded changed_files evidence is truncated.
Do not treat the THPDec temporary overlay structs as final accepted type layout facts from this PR slice alone.
Do not infer that all data-section improvements were intentionally data cleanup; review evidence shows some data-symbol/literal changes were reverted.
Do not promote register keywords, optimizer pragmas, or literal-symbol substitutions as accepted matching style; review evidence points the opposite direction.
Do not use the stale d65ac60 bot report as final regression status; PR body says it was superseded.
